## Scope

Describe one clear goal for this pull request.

## Change type

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Tests / fixtures
- [ ] Component

## Validation

- [ ] Branch was created from current `master`
- [ ] Diff contains no unrelated changes
- [ ] Relevant focused checks passed
- [ ] Existing files are preserved unless overwrite is intentional
- [ ] Docs or migration notes were updated when required
- [ ] PR is conflict-free with `master`

## Evidence

List commands, preview links, screenshots, or test output.

## Risk

Describe compatibility, bundle, browser, accessibility, registry, or release risk. Write `Low` when no material risk exists.

## Follow-up

List work intentionally excluded from this PR. Do not silently expand the current scope.
